title: Mexican Macaroni Bake
description: A comforting and flavorful casserole that combines the richness of mexican flavors with the simplicity of macaroni pasta.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until softened.
Stir in the garlicky pasta sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, pasta sauce mixture, and shredded mexican cheese.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
